reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.rtings.com/headphones/reviews/best/noise-cancelling and list EVERY noise-cancelling over-ear headphone that RTINGS recommends. Also check https://www.rtings.com/headphones/reviews/best/over-ear-headphones-under-100 and https://www.rtings.com/headphones/reviews/best/by-usage/commute-bus for commute picks. For each product get: full product name, category it's recommended for, overall score if shown, pros, cons. Exclude earbuds and in-ear models — only over-ear.

Search for 'site:soundguys.com best noise cancelling headphones 2025 2026' and also check https://www.soundguys.com/best-noise-cancelling-headphones/ directly. Extract every over-ear noise-cancelling headphone from their current recommendations. For each product get: full name, ranking position or category, pros/cons. Exclude earbuds and in-ear models.

Search for 'site:techradar.com best noise cancelling headphones 2025 2026' and also check https://www.techradar.com/best/best-noise-cancelling-headphones directly. Extract every over-ear noise-cancelling headphone from their current list. For each product get: full name, ranking position, pros/cons mentioned. Exclude earbuds and in-ear models — only over-ear.
